messages.text: When starting the server for the first time, claim it and set an admin password using the in-game Server Manager. Other players can join by adding the server through their own Server Manager. See the Satisfactory dedicated server guide for more details. https://satisfactory.wiki.gg/wiki/Dedicated_servers
CPU and memory requirements increase as the game progresses. If performance degrades, consider upgrading to a compute-optimized instance (C family).
